originalTitle: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
title: Ghana and EU sign landmark defence deal to combat militant Islamist threat
content: Ghana is the first African country to make such a deal with the EU, the Ghanaian vice-president says.

originalTitle: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
title: Elon Musk's Starlink blocked from operating in Namibia
content: Namibia's regulator noted that Starlink's subsidiary is not locally owned.

originalTitle: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
title: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
content: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.

originalTitle: Iran names successor to security chief killed in US-Israeli attack
title: Iran names successor to security chief killed in US-Israeli attack
content: Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr, ex-IRGC commander, to replace late Ali Larijani as chief of Supreme National Security Council.

originalTitle: Afghanistan frees detained US citizen Dennis Coyle as gesture of ‘goodwill’
title: Afghanistan frees detained US citizen Dennis Coyle as gesture of ‘goodwill’
content: US State Secretary Marco Rubio welcomes Coyle's release as 'positive step' and thanks Qatar and the UAE for their help.

originalTitle: Israeli strike lands near Roman ruins in Lebanon
title: Israeli strike lands near Roman ruins in Lebanon
content: Smoke was seen rising close to Roman ruins in the Lebanese city of Tyre after an Israeli strike hit a building nearby.

originalTitle: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been overturned
title: Iran war shows norms of international conflicts have been overturned
content: US threats against energy infrastructure, and Iran's retaliation on its Gulf neighbours, signal a clear change.

originalTitle: Russia launches 948 drones at Ukraine in largest attack over 24-hour period
title: Russia launches 948 drones at Ukraine in largest attack over 24-hour period
content: Cities across the west of Ukraine were hit, with residential buildings damaged and many injured.

originalTitle: Australia and EU agree sweeping trade deal in face of global uncertainty
title: Australia and EU agree sweeping trade deal in face of global uncertainty
content: Australia and the EU sign sweeping trade and security deals after years of negotiations.

originalTitle: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
title: Salah to leave Liverpool at end of season
content: Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah announces he will leave the club at the end of the season.

originalTitle: How Scotland reached the World Cup - told by those who made it happen
title: How Scotland reached the World Cup - told by those who made it happen
content: Tom English speaks to those who returned Scotland to the men's World Cup finals  for the first time since 1998 about the epic win over Denmark.

originalTitle: Keep Tudor? Go for De Zerbi, Mason or Redknapp? Where do Spurs go next?
title: Keep Tudor? Go for De Zerbi, Mason or Redknapp? Where do Spurs go next?
content: BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty asks what Spurs should do next with uncertainty surrounding the future of interim head coach Igor Tudor.
